name: Zinc Media Group plc
summary: Zinc Media Group plc, a multimedia company, produces television and radio programs in the United Kingdom and internationally. The company operates through three segments: TV, Publishing, and Digital. It operates television production activities under the Reef TV, Blakeway, Blakeway North, Brook Lapping, Films of Record, and Tern Television brand names. The company also engages in the creation and management of Websites and online TV channels; publishing, Website, event management, video production, and specialized communication operations; and digital marketing activities. In addition, it offers contract publishing services; and manages a digital and cross-platform education program, as well as various educational Websites. The company was formerly known as Ten Alps plc and changed its name to Zinc Media Group plc in November 2016. Zinc Media Group plc was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in London, the United Kingdom.
